nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Unicolored tapaculo
nodes.summary: Unicolored tapaculo（Unicolored tapaculo，学名 Scytalopus unicolor），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于安地斯山脈，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: 安地斯山脈
nodes.summary: 安地斯山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联156种鸟类，包括北山䳍、达尔文拟䳍、高山斑䳍等156种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits the dense understory of humid montane forest on the east side of the Andes at elevations of

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits the dense understory of humid montane forest on the east side of the Andes at elevations of

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The IUCN has assessed the unicolored tapaculo as being near threatened. However, although it is fairly common within its very small range and appears to tolerate disturbance, its habitat is very fragmented and at risk from fire
